seo_description: Current time in Lusaka, Zambia. Central Africa Time (CAT, UTC+2) year-round — no DST. Live clock and time differences for Lusaka.

faq.question: What time is it in Lusaka right now?
faq.answer: Lusaka, Zambia uses Central Africa Time (CAT, UTC+2) year-round. Zambia does not observe Daylight Saving Time, so clocks never change. The IANA identifier is Africa/Lusaka. Lusaka shares the UTC+2 offset with Harare (Zimbabwe), Johannesburg (South Africa), Gaborone (Botswana), and Maputo (Mozambique). The live clock above shows the current Lusaka time.

faq.question: What time zone is Lusaka in?
faq.answer: Lusaka, Zambia uses Central Africa Time (CAT, UTC+2) year-round. The IANA identifier is Africa/Lusaka. Zambia does not observe Daylight Saving Time. CAT (UTC+2) is the standard time zone across southern and central Africa, shared with South Africa, Zimbabwe, Botswana, Namibia, Malawi, and DR Congo (eastern).

faq.question: Does Lusaka observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: No. Lusaka, Zambia does not observe Daylight Saving Time. Zambia uses Central Africa Time (CAT, UTC+2) permanently year-round. No southern or central African country currently observes DST.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Lusaka and London?
faq.answer: Lusaka (CAT, UTC+2) is 2 hours ahead of London (GMT, UTC+0) in winter. During UK summer time (BST, UTC+1), Lusaka is 1 hour ahead. Zambia does not observe DST.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Lusaka and New York?
faq.answer: Lusaka (CAT, UTC+2) is 7 hours ahead of New York (EST, UTC-5) in winter. During US DST (EDT, UTC-4), Lusaka is 6 hours ahead. Zambia does not observe DST.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Lusaka?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Lusaka are 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CAT, Monday through Friday. Lusaka is Zambia's capital and economic center. Zambia is one of the world's largest copper producers — the Copperbelt region supplies a significant share of global copper. Major sectors include mining, agriculture, construction, and financial services. The Lusaka Securities Exchange (LuSE) trades from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM CAT.
